name: phrmai-sheldonbarnes-com
description: PHRMAI — pharma-AI interactive tools, on the road to HumanOS. Hosted at phrmai.sheldonbarnes.com.

scripts.dev: npm run install:all && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names shell,chromatin-lens,protein-viewer --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,green "npm:dev:shell" "npm:dev:chromatin-lens" "npm:dev:protein-viewer"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run preview
